week.description: Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 and GPT-5 models through a simple REST interface without API keys or billing.
week.features: A reverse-engineered interface that exposes Windows Copilot functionality as an OpenAI-compatible API. It allows access to advanced models via a REST interface without needing separate billing or keys.

week.name: security-audit-skill
week.description: A coding-agent skill for multi-phase security audits with independently verified, machine-readable findings
week.features: A specialized coding-agent skill designed to perform multi-phase security audits on codebases. It provides verifiable, machine-readable findings to ensure code integrity.

week.description: VS Code chat sidebar for local AI coding agents

week.features: An AI-powered 'Hawk-Eye' system designed for badminton match analysis. It tracks player and shuttlecock movement to provide automated insight and officiating assistance.

week.name: recall
week.description: Stop wasting tokens and re-explaining your project every session. Recall gives Claude Code durable memory — entirely offline.
week.features: A tool that provides Claude Code with persistent, durable, and entirely offline memory. It prevents context loss and repetitive explanations between sessions.
week.applications: Useful for developers working on long-term projects who want their AI coding assistants to maintain a deep understanding of the project's history.

month.name: odysseus

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

month.features: A self-hosted artificial intelligence workspace environment. It allows users to maintain control over their AI tools and data within a private, local infrastructure.
month.applications: Ideal for developers and privacy-conscious users who want to host and manage their own AI development environments without relying on third-party cloud services.

month.name: ponytail
month.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
month.features: An AI agent designed to prioritize minimalism and code avoidance. It follows the philosophy that the best code is the code that is never written, encouraging efficient and lazy problem-solving.
month.applications: Used by software engineers who want an AI partner that suggests refactoring, elimination, or simplified solutions rather than just generating new code.

month.name: MiMo-Code
month.description: MiMo Code: Where Models and Agents Co-Evolve
month.features: A collaborative platform focusing on the co-evolution of AI models and software agents. It bridges the gap between agentic behavior and underlying model development.
month.applications: Suitable for researchers and developers working on agentic workflows and looking to optimize the synergy between LLMs and autonomous agents.

month.name: book
month.description: The canonical reference for Astrid OS: kernel, capsules, host ABI, the bus, and the security model.
month.features: The official documentation and reference for Astrid OS. It details core components including the kernel, capsules, host ABI, communication bus, and security architecture.
month.applications: Essential reading for system developers and architects building software or services on top of the Astrid OS platform.

month.name: handbook
month.description: How to work on Astrid: the polyrepo, the kernel-is-dumb law, the RFC trigger, contribution tiers, and the release process.
month.features: A comprehensive operational guide for contributing to Astrid OS. It covers project management, the 'kernel-is-dumb' architectural law, RFC processes, and contribution governance.
month.applications: A mandatory reference for developers and open-source contributors who wish to participate in the Astrid OS development ecosystem effectively.

month.name: improve
month.description: Use your most capable model to audit your codebase and write plans for cheaper models to execute.
month.features: An intelligent auditing tool that leverages high-capability models to analyze codebases. It generates actionable execution plans for more cost-effective, smaller models to carry out.
month.applications: Helps engineering teams maintain code quality and refactor projects efficiently while optimizing costs by offloading routine implementation to smaller, cheaper AI models.

month.name: ian-xiaohei-illustrations

month.features: A curated informational guide focused on facilitating US stock market investments for Chinese users. It provides insights into processes, platforms, and considerations for cross-border trading.
month.applications: A practical resource for retail investors looking to enter the US stock market and navigate the regulatory and technical requirements.

month.name: PixelRAG

month.name: omnigent
month.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.
month.features: A comprehensive open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness. It enables seamless orchestration and swapping between various agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor while enforcing security policies.

three_months.name: caveman

three_months.name: graphify
three_months.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

three_months.applications: Useful for software architects and engineers who need to visualize and query complex system dependencies and documentation concurrently.

year.name: openclaw

year.applications: It is ideal for users seeking a unified AI companion that functions seamlessly on any device or OS platform.

year.name: superpowers
year.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

year.applications: This framework is intended for developers building sophisticated agent systems who need a reliable methodology for managing agent tasks and skills.

year.name: ECC
year.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
year.features: ECC offers a performance optimization system for agent harnesses, focusing on memory, security, and research-driven development. It integrates seamlessly with popular coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to enhance their functional output.
year.applications: It is designed for developers who want to optimize the efficiency, memory management, and security of their existing AI coding agents.

year.name: hermes-agent
year.description: The agent that grows with you
year.features: Hermes Agent is an adaptive artificial intelligence designed to grow and evolve alongside the user. Its core philosophy revolves around continuous learning and scalability to meet shifting personal or professional needs.
year.applications: This tool is perfect for users looking for a long-term AI partner that adapts its behavior and skills to their specific workflows over time.

year.name: claw-code
year.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
year.features: Claw-Code is an autonomous, agent-managed software project written in Rust, specifically designed for managing museum exhibits. It operates with minimal human intervention, utilizing automated coding frameworks to maintain and update its codebase.
year.applications: It serves as a prime example of fully autonomous software maintenance and is useful for those exploring self-managing systems in specialized hardware or exhibit environments.

year.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
year.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
year.features: This project provides a specialized CLAUDE.md file containing curated guidelines to refine the coding behavior of Claude Code. It incorporates specific lessons derived from Andrej Karpathy's analysis of common LLM coding errors.
year.applications: Developers can use this configuration file to significantly reduce hallucinations and improve the quality of code generated by Claude-based coding assistants.

year.name: skills
year.features: This is a public repository maintained by Anthropic dedicated to documenting and providing agent skills. It offers a standardized library of capabilities that developers can integrate into their AI agents.
year.applications: It is a vital resource for developers looking to implement standardized and high-quality functional capabilities within their AI agent ecosystems.

year.applications: Software engineers who want to supercharge their existing AI coding tools with tried-and-tested, production-ready workflows will find this highly useful.

year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
year.features: Agency Agents provides a suite of specialized AI agents, each serving as an expert in a specific domain such as frontend development, community management, and logical verification. Each agent is pre-configured with distinct personalities and processes to deliver professional results.

audio_video.name: graphify
audio_video.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). audio_video.name: open-design
audio_video.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs.

audio_video.features: OmniVoice provides high-quality voice cloning and text-to-speech capabilities supporting over 600 languages. It focuses on delivering natural and diverse vocal synthesis.

audio_video.applications: Targeted at creators and voice actors who need a private, locally-run solution for dubbing, dictation, and custom voice cloning without relying on cloud services.

audio_video.name: reclip
audio_video.description: Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.
audio_video.features: Reclip is a lightweight, self-hosted media downloader that features a clean web-based user interface. It is designed to download videos from nearly any website with ease.
audio_video.applications: Useful for individuals who want a private, server-based tool to archive media content from the web without relying on third-party download services.

audio_video.name: MOSS-TTS-Nano
audio_video.description: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.
audio_video.features: MOSS-TTS-Nano is a tiny, 0.1B parameter multilingual speech generation model designed for high-speed performance. It can run directly on CPU hardware, making it extremely lightweight for integration.
audio_video.applications: Ideal for real-time applications and lightweight product integrations where fast speech synthesis is required on hardware without a dedicated GPU.

audio_video.name: html-video
audio_video.description: Programmatic video for coding agents — HTML to video on your laptop. Turn HTML, CSS & data into real MP4s with pluggable render engines, 21 templates, AI soundtrack. Apache-2.0, no per-render fees. An official project by the Open Design team.
audio_video.features: This project allows for programmatic video creation by converting HTML and CSS into MP4 files. It supports various templates and AI-generated soundtracks without requiring per-render fees.
audio_video.applications: Excellent for developers who need to generate dynamic video content programmatically using familiar web technologies like HTML and CSS.

audio_video.name: MisoTTS
audio_video.description: Miso TTS is an 8 billion, highly emotive text-to-speech model
audio_video.features: Miso TTS is a robust 8-billion parameter model optimized for emotive and expressive text-to-speech generation. It emphasizes high-fidelity sound quality that captures human-like emotional nuances.
audio_video.applications: Perfect for game developers and digital storytellers requiring highly expressive, realistic voice synthesis to bring characters to life.

audio_video.name: openless
audio_video.description: Hold a key, speak, release — AI-polished text appears at your cursor in any app. Open-source voice input for macOS & Windows. (按住快捷键说话，松开即得润色后的文字)
audio_video.features: Openless provides an open-source voice-to-text solution for Windows and macOS that works in any application. It features an intuitive 'push-to-talk' interface that automatically polishes spoken content into text at the cursor.
audio_video.applications: Designed for professionals and writers who want to accelerate their drafting process by dictating and instantly generating polished, AI-corrected text in any software.
